司令官のためにやるぞーっ！<br>えい、えい、おー♪:
For the Boss, I'll give it my all!
Hey, hey, let's go!♪
『ここで頑張れば、司令官のためになる――』と聞かされたテルーは、<br>娼館で働:
Telu was told working here would help the Commander, so she decided
to work at the brothel. She changed into her costume and got psyched up.
そしてさっそく、客として兵士があてがわれた。<br>だが、彼の表情は暗く、重い。:
Soon, a soldier was assigned as her customer, but his expression was
dark and heavy.
だ、大丈夫？ 元気がなさそうだけど……: A-are you okay? You seem kind of down...
ちょ、ちょっと働き過ぎて、疲れてしまって――: I-I've been working too much, and I'm exhausted...
そっか……大変だったね。でも、頑張ってえらいよー♪:
I see... That must have been tough. But you've worked hard. Good
job!♪
兵士はテルーの微笑みに胸を打たれる。<br>感激した様子で、おずおずとおねだりし:
The soldier was deeply moved by Telu's smile. Looking grateful, he
timidly pleaded with her.
ん？ してほしいことって？: Hm? What do you want me to do?
――ここでは言いにくい。<br>そう告げた兵士と共に、テルーは部屋へと向かうのだ: He said it was hard to say here, so Telu went with him to the room.
